articles.title: Acme Corp signs supply contract
articles.body: Acme Corp signed a three-year supply contract with Globex Inc for battery modules.
articles.summary: Acme signed a supply contract with Globex.

articles.title: North River Metals schedules maintenance
articles.body: North River Metals scheduled routine maintenance at its nickel plant next month.

articles.title: East Power signs grid equipment contract
articles.body: East Power Ltd signed a grid equipment contract for a regional utility upgrade.
articles.summary: East Power signed a grid equipment contract.
